##NAMES=Alluaudite
##RRUFFID=R141067
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[box]NaMnFe^3+^_2_(PO_4_)_3_
##LOCALITY=Pleasant Valley pegmatite, Fourmile, Custer District, Custer County, South Dakota, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rob Lavinsky
##DESCRIPTION=Massive dark-brown crystals, associated with quartz, mica, and dark-green schorl.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R141067
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Na_0.93_Ca_0.03_)(Mn_0.77_Fe^2+^_0.21_Mg_0.06_)Fe^3+^_2_(PO_4_)_3_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
